title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - aws
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the AWS Cloud Architecture & Services course has achieved a high completion rate of 100% and a solid attendance rate of 93.3%. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk due to a pass rate of 83.3%, indicating that a significant portion of trainees did not meet the expected performance standards.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
The average score of 7.32 out of 10 reflects a moderate understanding of the course material, while the feedback rating of 4.71 out of 5 suggests that trainees found the course content valuable.
Despite these positive indicators, two trainees require additional support as they did not meet the pass threshold, highlighting a need for targeted interventions.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, consider reviewing course content and delivery methods to address the performance gaps and improve the overall pass rate.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.

approval.note: User requested finalization for the current AWS L&D report. Evidence Gate re-checked and PASS before human review/finalization step.
